name: Persian Noodle Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 large Onions, peeled and thinly sliced
1/4 cup Dried red kidney beans, washed and soaked in cold water for 2 hours and drained
1/2 cup Coarsely chopped fresh chives or scallions
1 Fresh beet, peeled and diced in 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the onions in 3 tablespoons oil in a large pot.
2. Add 2 teaspoons salt, 1/2 teaspoon pepper, and 1/2 teaspoon turmeric to the onions.
3. Pour in 10 cups water and add kidney beans, navy beans, and chickpeas; bring to boil, skim the froth as it forms, reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 45 minutes over medium heat.
4. Add lentils and beef broth. Cook an additional 55 minutes.
5. Add chopped chives or scallions, dill, parsley, spinach, and beet. Continue cooking, stirring from time to time, until the beans are tender, which may take up to 1-1/2 hours. Adjust seasoning as needed and add water if the soup is too thick.
6. Add noodles and flour. Cook about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Stir in the liquid whey (or vinegar) and mix well.
8. Pour the soup into a tureen and serve.
